records.rawToolName: Shanghai Film School AI Innovation Platform DeepSeek-R1

records.accessStatus: current school-limited service; student/staff identifier required

evidence.sourceTitle: 国内影视高校首家！上海大学上海电影学院AI创智平台上线！
evidence.evidenceSnippet: 上海大学上海电影学院AI创智平台正式上线DeepSeek-R1大模型服务。上海大学上海电影学院师生可通过以下方式访问上海电影学院AI创智平台DeepSeek R1；登录名：学号@shu.edu.cn；学院在编教职工使用工号。
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 正式上线DeepSeek-R1大模型服务(文末附登录及使用方式),系国内影视领域首家基于国产算力部署落地的高等院校。这一平台的落地,不仅标志着中国AI影视技术在国产化进程中取得了关键突破,也为高校影视教育和创作开启了全新的智能化探索时代。 国产自主AI技术赋能影视创作新模式 本次成功上线国产GPU影视教育专用AI大模型平台,得益于上海大学上海电影学院多年来联合上海源庐加佳信息科技有限公司、沐曦集成电路(上海)股份有限公司开展深度产学研合作。此前由三方联合共建的“影视行业数字渲染国产技术示范中心”,为平台提供了全方位的技术支持。平台基于国产沐曦高性能GPU芯片的加佳智算集群,能够实现从剧本调研到内容生成的全流程AI辅助,开创了国产自主AI技术影视创作的新模式。

records.description: Adobe's generative AI engine available through KU's approved Creative Cloud and Adobe Express environment.

evidence.sourceTitle: Approved AI Tools | KU Information Technology
evidence.evidenceSnippet: KU makes Adobe Creative Cloud available to faculty, staff, researchers, and eligible students, with eligibility depending on major or employment role.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Adobe Creative Cloud is a full suite of professional creativity tools including Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere, and many more. It is available to KU Lawrence faculty, staff, researchers, and some students and student employees based on their major or employment role.

evidence.sourceTitle: Approved AI Tools | KU Information Technology
evidence.evidenceSnippet: KU's approved Adobe environment uses Firefly in Creative Cloud and Adobe Express, and lists Adobe Firefly as included and available as a standalone web app.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Adobe Creative Cloud leverages Firefly, Adobe's generative AI engine, for a variety of generative AI tasks and enhancements. Adobe Express is available to all KU Lawrence students, faculty, staff, and researchers, and offers lightweight and powerful tools to design digital, print, and video media.

evidence.sourceTitle: Approved AI Tools | KU Information Technology
evidence.evidenceSnippet: KU identifies the listed generative AI products as approved tools within its enterprise licensing environment.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The generative AI tools above are the approved AI tools in place across the enterprise licensing environment; this doesn't mean that you can't request to purchase or use other AI tools or applications not listed here on an individual basis.

records.description: A GPT-4.1-powered natural-language assistant integrated into the BGUsearch library catalogue.
records.howToObtain: Open BGUsearch, choose the AI-Assistant tab, and sign in to a BGUsearch account.
records.institutionalRelationship: Integrated into Ben-Gurion University's official library catalogue

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Assistant - BGUsearch
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Ben-Gurion University's BGUsearch catalogue now includes a GPT-4.1-powered AI Assistant for natural-language searches over catalogue sources.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The BGUsearch catalog now includes the new AI-Assistant search tool, powered by generative artificial intelligence (GPT-4.1). This feature enables users to perform natural language searches to locate reliable academic sources drawn directly from the catalog.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Assistant - BGUsearch
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The official instructions direct users to the BGUsearch AI-Assistant tab and require account sign-in before submitting a research question.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Go to the BGUsearch catalog and from the top menu, select the "AI-Assistant" tab: 2. Sign in to your account: 3. Enter the research question (for example: " How does peer pressure influence risk-taking behavior in adolescents?") and press Enter to run a search.

records.description: Generative AI research assistant accessible through the BGUsearch database catalogue.
records.howToObtain: Enter BGUsearch Database Search, open Web of Science, and select Research Assistant; an institutional email account is recommended for saved results.
records.institutionalRelationship: BGU Library provides official BGUsearch access instructions

evidence.sourceTitle: Web of Science - Research Assistant
evidence.evidenceSnippet: BGU Library's official guide identifies Web of Science Research Assistant as a generative AI tool for literature exploration and journal discovery.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The Web of Science Research Assistant is a generative AI tool that enables users to explore topics, conduct literature reviews, and identify leading journals using natural language queries.

evidence.sourceTitle: Web of Science - Research Assistant
evidence.evidenceSnippet: BGU Library instructs users to enter BGUsearch Database Search, open Web of Science, and select the Research Assistant interface.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Enter the BGUsearch catalog, select "Database Search" from the top toolbar, and type the database name – Web of Science – into the search box.

evidence.sourceTitle: Google Workspace y herramientas IA | Servicio de Informática y Comunicaciones
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Workspace ofrece a la Comunidad Universitaria de la US un conjunto de herramientas de comunicación y colaboración de Google basadas en la web, que proporciona un entorno único e integrado para las aplicaciones de Google como son: Drive (Documentos, Hojas de Cálculo, Formularios, Presentaciones) con 10 GB de almacenamiento para personal en activo y 2 GB para Estudiantes, Google Meet, Google Sites, y las herramientas de IA Gemini y NotebookLM. El alta de los usuarios en la plataforma es automática en el momento de vincularse con la universidad.

evidence.sourceTitle: 생성형 AI 서비스개시 안내 및 부산대 웹메일계정 신청 안내
evidence.evidenceSnippet: 에듀테크센터에서는 우리 대학 구성원의 AI 활용 역량 강화를 위하여 Google Workspace for Education Plus 및 Google AI Pro for Education 서비스를 제공하고자 합니다. 위 서비스는 2026. 6. 24.(수) 09:00부터 라이선스 배포가 완료되어 이용 가능합니다. Google AI Pro for Education: Gemini, NotebookLM, Gmail·Docs·Sheets 내 AI 작성 및 분석 기능 등 교육용 AI 도구 제공. 본 서비스는 본교 Google 계정 기반으로 제공되며, 서비스 이용을 위해 본교 웹메일(@pusan.ac.kr) 로그인 필요.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 에듀테크센터에서는 우리 대학 구성원의 AI 활용 역량 강화를 위하여 Google Workspace for Education Plus 및 Google AI Pro for Education 서비스를 제공하고자 합니다 . 위 서비스는 2026. 6. 24.( 수 ) 09:00 부터 라이선스 배포가 완료되어 이용 가능합니다 .

evidence.sourceTitle: 산지니 AI
evidence.evidenceSnippet: 학사·행정·연구 업무를 보다 효율적으로 수행할 수 있도록 다양한 생성형 AI 에이전트와 교내 주요 정보 안내 AI 에이전트를 하나로 통합한 부산대학교 특화 AI 에이전트 서비스이다. 사용 가능 대상자: 교직원(재직, 휴직), 학생(재학, 휴학). 사용 방법: 산지니 AI 홈페이지 접속 ... 통합인증 계정(아이디, 비밀번호) 로그인.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 학사·행정·연구 업무를 보다 효율적으로 수행할 수 있도록 다양한 생성형 AI 에이전트와 교내 주요 정보 안내 AI 에이전트를 하나로 통합한 부산대학교 특화 AI 에이전트 서비스이다. 사용 가능 대상자 교직원(재직, 휴직) 학생(재학, 휴학) 일반사용자 사용 방법 산지니 AI 홈페이지( https://sanjinee.pusan.ac.kr ) 접속 교육정보시스템 - 바로가기 - 유용한 서비스 – 산지니 AI 클릭 부산대학교 홈페이지 / PLATO / 학생지원시스템 / 스마트캠퍼스앱 - 산지니 AI 버튼 클릭 통합인증 계정(아이디, 비밀번호) 로그인 통합인증 계정(아이디, 비밀번호) 로그인 아이디 학생: 학번, 2000학번 이전의 경우 '19' + 학번(총 9자리) ※신입생: (학번부여 전) 수험번호 교직원: 교직원번호 비밀번호 통합인증 비밀전호 ※최초 접속일 경우, 주민등록번호 앞자리 6자리 ※통합인증 계정(아이디, 비밀번호) 찾기는 [서비스이용안내>정보서비스>통합인증시스템] 참조 서비스 구성 서비스 구성 구분 내용 이용

evidence.sourceTitle: KI für alle – Neuer Dienst GPT.UP bringt KI-gestützte Chat-Assistenten für alle Angehörigen der Universität Potsdam
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zum Wintersemester 2024/25 startet die Universität Potsdam den neuen Dienst GPT.UP, der allen Universitätsangehörigen die Arbeit mit einem KI-gestützten Chat-Assistenten ermöglicht. Der Dienst GPT.UP ist ab sofort für alle Angehörigen der Universität Potsdam kostenlos nutzbar.

evidence.sourceTitle: Geminiの利用について – 神戸大学情報基盤センター
evidence.evidenceSnippet: 本学のGoogle Workspaceアカウントで利用できるGeminiは基本プランです。現在，本学の契約では，Geminiの利用履歴（チャット）をご自身で削除することができません。
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 本学のGoogle Workspaceアカウントで利用できるGeminiは 基本プラン です. 利用に当たって制限がありますので,詳しくは Geminiのヘルプページ をご確認ください. また,生成AIの利用については, 本学公式Webページ も併せてご確認ください. 注意事項 現在,本学の契約では,Geminiの利用履歴(チャット)をご自身で削除することができません.

evidence.sourceTitle: Artificial Intelligence — IT Service Centre
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The kiChat offers simple, privacy-compliant and free access to powerful language models from various providers.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: The kiChat offers simple, privacy‐compliant and free access to powerful language models from various providers. Overview API-Service The API Service allows the simple use of our AI language models in your projects via our standardised interface.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot is licensed and recommended by the University of Jyväskylä for information seeking.
records.howToObtain: Sign in to Microsoft services with JYU credentials.
records.institutionalRelationship: University-licensed and recommended service

evidence.sourceTitle: AI tools for finding up-to-date information | University of Jyväskylä
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Licensed and recommended by the University of Jyväskylä! Microsoft Copilot is an AI-assisted chatbot that utilizes the Bing search engine and OpenAI’s language model. Make sure you are logged into Microsoft’s services with your JYU credentials.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Licensed and recommended by the University of Jyväskylä! Microsoft Copilot is an AI-assisted chatbot that utilizes the Bing search engine and OpenAI’s language model.

records.description: Chongqing University's AI counselor, Runxin, is an institutional service for the whole university community.
records.howToObtain: Access Runxin through Chongqing University's Smart Student Work platform using institutional identity verification.
records.accessAudience: All Chongqing University faculty and students
records.accessStatus: Fully open to the university community
records.institutionalRelationship: Built by Chongqing University's Party Committee Student Work Department

evidence.sourceTitle: 重庆大学AI辅导员“润欣”全面上线-重庆大学
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Chongqing University's AI counselor, Runxin, was built by the Party Committee Student Work Department and is fully open to all faculty and students; users authenticate through the Smart Student Work platform.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: “润欣”由重庆大学党委学工部牵头建设,引入具有国际领先水平的智谱全新一代大语言模型能力,探索用人工智能构建学生能用、易用、爱用的数字思政教育产品。“润欣”能咨询,会办事,畅通了生校渠道,输出了情绪价值,支持语音输入、操作便捷。“润欣”于今年8月25日上线,为新生提供服务,目前已面向全校师生全面开放使用。“润欣”的推出,以其强大的模型能力和知识库支持,为辅导员队伍提供了有效的补充,提高了思想政治教育的针对性和实效性。

records.description: A protected multi-model AI portal offered to the entire UMinho community during an official pilot.
records.howToObtain: Open chat.iaedu.pt, choose UMinho, and authenticate with institutional credentials.
records.institutionalRelationship: UMinho joined the national higher-education IAedu pilot

evidence.sourceTitle: Comunidade da UMinho com acesso gratuito à plataforma IAedu
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UMinho joined the IAedu pilot, giving its whole community free protected access to GPT-4o, Mistral Large, and o4-mini through institutional login.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: A Universidade do Minho aderiu ao projeto IAedu, da unidade de serviços digitais da Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia (FCCN/FCT), que nesta fase-piloto garante a toda a nossa Comunidade o acesso gratuito e protegido a várias ferramentas de Inteligência Artificial a partir de um só portal.

records.description: Protected Gemini access available with Mines credentials.
records.howToObtain: Sign in with a Mines username and password.
records.institutionalRelationship: Mines-approved protected account access

evidence.sourceTitle: Faculty Guidance on Generative AI
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Gemini and Microsoft Copilot are free for all Mines faculty, students, and staff using Mines credentials, with protected data handling.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Google Gemini and Microsoft Copilot are free to use for all Mines faculty, students, and staff using their Mines username and password . While logged in with your Mines account, the data you enter into these tools are protected and will not be used to train their AI models.

records.description: Google AI Studio is available through the Mines login.
records.howToObtain: Sign in with a Mines login.
records.institutionalRelationship: Mines-provided Google account access

evidence.sourceTitle: Faculty Guidance on Generative AI
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Mines states that Google NotebookLM and Google AI Studio are available with a Mines login.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Google Notebook LM and Google AI Studio are also available to use with your Mines login. For more information, see IT’s Knowledge Base . 4. Are there privacy concerns with using AI tools, and what happens to my data?

records.description: AI answer engine integrated into learning through an official Chandigarh University partnership.
records.howToObtain: Use the AI-enhanced academic resources made available through the university partnership.
records.accessAudience: Chandigarh University students, researchers, and faculty
records.institutionalRelationship: University partnership with Perplexity

evidence.sourceTitle: CU Pioneers AI-Driven Learning as India's First Private University to Partner with Perplexity
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Chandigarh University's official Perplexity partnership gives students, researchers, and faculty seamless access to AI-enhanced academic resources.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Chandigarh University continues to set the gold standard in higher education by becoming the first private university in India to collaborate with Perplexity, the world's first answer engine.

records.description: Secure higher-education AI chatbot platform providing ChatGPT GPT-4o and GPT-4o mini.
records.howToObtain: Use federated Shibboleth login with a valid Uni Jena account.
records.institutionalRelationship: Provided by the Thuringian Universities IT Centre for Uni Jena

evidence.sourceTitle: HAWKI - AI-Chatbot
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Thuringian Universities IT Centre provides HAWKI as a secure AI chatbot platform with GPT-4o models.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Das IT-Zentrum der Thüringer Hochschulen stellt die webbasierte Plattform HAWKI zur sicheren und effektiven Nutzung eines AI-Chatbots zur Verfügung.

evidence.sourceTitle: HAWKI - AI-Chatbot
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The service is available to Uni Jena employees with a valid university account through federated Shibboleth login.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Der Dienst wird allen Mitarbeitenden der Uni Jena mit einem gültigen Uni-Account zur Verfügung gestellt. Das Login erfolgt mit dem Uni-Account über eine föderierte Anmeldung (sog.

records.description: Microsoft Copilot is listed by FIU's Center for the Advancement of Teaching as accessible to FIU faculty, staff, and students.
records.howToObtain: Use FIU email credentials on the Copilot website.
records.costToUser: Free access with FIU email credentials.
records.accessStatus: Current access with FIU email credentials
records.institutionalRelationship: FIU Center for the Advancement of Teaching listed tool

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools | FIU Center for the Advancement of Teaching
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft's Copilot: An AI chatbot for creating content via chat prompts, accessible to FIU faculty, staff, and students. Free access with FIU email credentials.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Microsoft’s general AI chatbot, similar to ChatGPT. FIU faculty, staff, and students have free access to it through their email credentials on the Copilot website.

records.description: Lecturer-controlled AI design assistant presented in CDU's staff AI resources.
records.howToObtain: Access through CDU's staff AI resources when enabled by the lecturer.
records.accessAudience: CDU teaching staff and lecturer-authorized users
records.institutionalRelationship: CDU staff AI teaching resource

evidence.sourceTitle: Gen AI for staff
evidence.evidenceSnippet: CDU's AI Design Assistant is controlled by the lecturer and prioritizes lawful, ethical, and responsible use.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI Design Assistant is controlled by the lecturer and priorities lawful, ethical and responsible use. Use the Design Assistant Apply to your practice Ethics in research Ensure your work follows human ethics policies and legislation.

records.description: Free Microsoft Copilot web access for CDU students.
records.howToObtain: Use the Copilot link from CDU's AI resources and authenticate as directed.
records.institutionalRelationship: CDU-provided student access

evidence.sourceTitle: AI for students
evidence.evidenceSnippet: CDU students have free access to Microsoft Copilot Web through the university's AI resources.
evidence.evidenceSnippetOriginal: CDU students have free access to Microsoft Copilot, which is an AI-powered assistant. Use Copilot Use AI in research Learn about iThenticate, a suite of features aimed at preserving the authenticity of your scholarly contributions.
